title: フクキタル来れば福来たる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out to meet up with Matikanefukukitaru on
my day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyahhhhh!
choice_data_list: What's wrong?!
What's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
F-finally! It really happened! I got ten "great
fortunes" in a row from my fortune slip key chain!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This racewear must be boosting my good luck! No
doubt about it!
choice_data_list: You think your racewear helped?
You think your racewear helped?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! With all these four-leaf clovers,
amulets, and good-luck charms, this racewear is
packed with fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was going to give it a spin around town to test
out its power, but I think it's already good to go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to put this overwhelming abundance of
luck to good use today!
choice_data_list: Maybe you could help someone out?
Maybe you could help someone out?
Give me some of that luck, please!
Give me some of that luck, please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to put this overwhelming abundance of
luck to good use today!
choice_data_list: Maybe you could help someone out?
Maybe you could help someone out?
Give me some of that luck, please!
Give me some of that luck, please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's a great idea! Now to find someone in
need of some help...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Wh-what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I didn't think it'd be that easy!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Sob! Where did he go?! Lucky! Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After asking the young girl a few questions, we
learn that she accidentally let go of her pet dog's
leash during their walk.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: With a name like Lucky, this can only be the work of fate!
choice_data_list: This definitely sounds like a job for you.
This definitely sounds like a job for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Matikanefukukitaru is on the job! I'll find
your little Lucky in no time!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You can count on it! Luck follows me wherever I
go, so little Lucky should be no different!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Dogs get along with other dogs, and I just happen
to have a lion-dog charm in my bag! You know,
like the statues you see at all the shrines!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now to commence the divination! I'll just put this
here, and... Woof, woof! Bow wow! Shiba Inu,
Chow Chow!

text_block_list.name: Shiba Inu
text_block_list.text: Pitter, patter... Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyahhhhh! Hey, gimme back my lion-dog!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A Shiba Inu suddenly runs up, snatches up the
lion-dog charm, and scampers off.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Wait! That dog has a leash on it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What if that's Lucky?! Let's hurry and find out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We give chase, following Lucky until he plants
himself down just outside of a shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If we get any closer, Lucky might run into
the mall and cause a scene...
choice_data_list: Do you have any animal-summoning charms?
Do you have any animal-summoning charms?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I have a spell that can project my
thoughts telepathically, but I've never tried it on
a dog before...
choice_data_list:
I know you can make it work with all that lucky
power you have!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! All the luck in the universe is with
me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Doberoo, mastifoo, malamoo, ho...
Labradoo, rottweiloo, spanieloo, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't say if the telepathy worked, but about ten
minutes later, Lucky walks close enough for us to
grab hold of his leash.

text_block_list.name: Lucky
text_block_list.text: Whine...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text:
Lucky! You're back! Thank you so much for the
help!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome. Hehe, guess we were quite lucky
in finding him, huh?
choice_data_list:
You are the Umamusume goddess of luck, after
all.

You are the Umamusume goddess of luck, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Really?! That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Uh, well... Heh, hehehe! I wouldn't go that far...
choice_data_list: Praise be to the great Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Praise be! Umm... Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, if you ever need any more help, leave
it to me and my super-lucky powers to work
things out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I went a little too far with that bit... How
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's just... I was so happy hearing all those
compliments. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'd say this outfit's lucky powers are now
officially certified! It's definitely coming with me
for my next race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You never know, maybe we'll meet that girl there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What?! You want some of my power?
choice_data_list: Please, I beg you! Just a smidge!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm... Even if you beg, I don't really know...
choice_data_list: I beseech thee, Goddess Matikanefukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Now, how could I say no to that?! Your
wish is my command!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll just sprinkle a little bit of my power on
this charm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nom, nom, hum, hum, doopee-dee! There you go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This charm here is a special one. With this, you'll
always end up with a raffle-winning popsicle stick
after finishing your icy treat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What an oddly specific power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...All the same, I take my newly imbued charm for
a test-drive and buy myself a popsicle.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You won! Congratulations! Hehe, looks like my
charm's working just as advertised, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Woo! Another winner!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And... another one?!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
There's no way we only have winners... That would
be crazy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amid the confusion, a man wobbles into the store
on the verge of collapse.

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: Please... give me... a popsicle...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh... I'm sorry, but... we kinda just bought all
of the popsicles...

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: You what?! Gyahhh! Thud.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eek! A-are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Hurry, give him one of your popsicles!

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I thought I was a goner. Please, let me
repay your kindness...

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: In return for a popsicle... Yes, this will do.

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: Here, take this box. Thank you, and farewell.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: There he goes... What do you think is inside?
choice_data_list: Let's open it and see.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second, Trainer! What if this is a trap?!
Like a Pandora's box situation!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No way! A shiny blue smartphone?! And it's
unopened!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! I-it's the newest model too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me... The charm isn't limited to just popsicles, but anything that begins with the letter p, like "phone"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer, there is more to be done!
choice_data_list: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It only took one charm to get all this! Just
imagine what would happen with two charms, or
even three!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is a huge chance for us! Let's get a whole
boatload of charms for you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... If you have this charm, you'll never
misplace your loose change! And this one helps
you split disposable chopsticks perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh, this is way too much trouble! Let's just get
'em all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I trudge through town like some kind of
decorated officer, covered head-to-toe in lucky
charms. I'm not quite sure what my
accomplishments are, however.
